strName.description: Code name of the homeworld (often the ATC code). Referenced from interactions and personspecs.

aCondsCitizen.description: Conditions applied to NPCs born here as citizens. Most entries refer to entry within conditions_simple.json (life-traits, language allowances); a minority live in conditions/. Multi-target via x-targets — extractor checks conditions_simple first, falls back to conditions.

aCondsResident.description: Conditions applied to NPCs spawning here as permanent residents. Refers to entry within conditions_simple.json (mostly), with conditions/ fallback.

aCondsIllegal.description: Conditions applied to NPCs spawning here illegally. Refers to entry within conditions_simple.json (mostly), with conditions/ fallback.
